channel.title: Zander's Daily Briefing
channel.description: A private daily enterprise-sales briefing for Zander Srodes — open deals, competitors, internal updates, product news, and the day's agenda. Auto-generated each weekday morning.
channel.itunes:author: Reeco Sales Intelligence
channel.itunes:summary: A private daily enterprise-sales briefing for Zander Srodes — open deals, competitors, internal updates, product news, and the day's agenda. Auto-generated each weekday morning.

item.title: Daily Briefing — Wednesday, July 1
item.description: Meetings: Crescent (Adam Butts, 11a), internal pipeline (1p), Drury check-in (2:30), Ted Jabara/Meyer Jabara (4p). Three deals expire today. Product: batch payments, offline price updates, payments pilot.

item.title: Daily Briefing — Tuesday, June 30
item.description: Headline briefing: Highgate $1.92M enters pipeline; Sage nears signature; product — batch payments, offline-supplier auto price updates, payments pilot.
